content.speakerText: So, after this, you'll meet your team at 10:30, then IT will walk you through the system.
content.speakerTextCn: 接下来10:30见团队，之后IT会教你用系统。
expectedAnswers: Wait, is the IT session at 10:30 or 11? I want to make sure I don’t miss it.
Just to confirm — team at 10:30, then IT right after?
Thanks for the schedule! So IT follows the team meeting — is that correct?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认了IT培训时间，避免歧义
语言准确性：语法正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合职场口语习惯，语气礼貌清晰
关键词覆盖：使用了‘IT session’、‘confirm’、‘on time’等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Lunch is at 12, and we'll do a quick office tour after that.
content.speakerTextCn: 中午12点吃午饭，之后我们会简单逛一下办公室。
expectedAnswers: Is there a cafeteria nearby? I’d like to know where to head after lunch.
Will the office tour start right after lunch, or is there a break?
Sounds good! Could you let me know how long the tour usually takes?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动询问与午餐或参观相关的实用细节
语言准确性：使用了恰当的疑问句结构和礼貌表达
表达自然度：符合新员工适应环境的积极语气
关键词覆盖：使用了‘cafeteria’、‘tour’、‘after lunch’等场景词汇
